creator: mfechner@FreeBSD.org
text:
It can take some time, that the builds server have finished building the packages.
The last days some packages where updates that will cause a rebuild of nearly all packages, so I suggest you just wait some days days and try it again.

In the meantime I also rebuild all packages required for gitlab to see if the current state in ports is ok.

I will update this ticket, if my build is finished.
